positive: A minimalist, highly stylized illustration of a sprawling cosmic forest. The scene features enormous, bioluminescent mushrooms, slender celestial trees with glowing roots, and floating, ethereal flora. The primary color palette should be deep indigo, vibrant cyan, and soft gold accents, contrasted against a velvety black background. Focus on sharp silhouettes and clean line work. The composition must be centrally balanced, suitable for all-over apparel printing, emphasizing the depth and mystery of the glowing forest. Style: Nordic folk illustration meets Art Deco geometric patterns. Lighting: Dramatic, dramatic glow emanating only from the flora and mushrooms, creating high contrast against deep shadows. Composition: Symmetric and radial.
negative: blurry, grainy, low resolution, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, distracting elements, hyper-realistic, photographic, cartoon, messy lines
